privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real example rocket design ('A simple model rocket.ork') from the OpenRocket source repository. The verifier strictly requires the removal of the original trapezoidal fins and the addition of 6 tube fins with dimensions of roughly 10mm radius, 70mm length, and 1mm thickness, matching the instructions. Additionally, it verifies that the exported report is at least 200 words, mentions both fin types, includes performance metrics, and that a simulation was successfully executed.
